evals.prompt: Use the skill under test to prepare startup context for the fixture repo in `evals/files/session-start-fixture/`. Assume the current agent runtime is Copilot CLI. evals.expected_output: A session-start block with rules checked/loaded/unavailable, shared plus Copilot rule files loaded, Gemini/Cursor/Windsurf rule files not loaded as Copilot rules, only the relevant timeout spec excerpt, and the target file, related test, and one example file.

The output does not load other-agent rules as Copilot rules: `.gemini/GEMINI.md`, `.cursorrules`, `.cursor/rules/quality.md`, and `.windsurfrules` are absent from `Rules loaded`.
The output includes the relevant login-timeout spec excerpt and excludes unrelated spec sections such as billing exports.
The output names `src/auth_service.py`, `tests/test_auth_service.py`, and `src/session_service.py`.
